title: Finder Agentic Grounding Demo
query: Find the dark brown console table in the living room.
target: find the dark brown console table in the living room

stages.name: Plan
stages.line: Parse the query, build target phrases, and scope the search to relevant scene regions.
stages.caption: The planner builds a query-conditioned search plan; scoped routing is part of the plan output and allocates frames to the relevant room context.

stats.label: Target
stats.value: find the dark brown console table in the living room

logs: planner.reason: Loop 0: search for primary target 'find the dark brown console table in the living room' with 0 supporting target(s).
scope.mode: explicit_room; rooms: living room_1, living room_2
routing.filters: living room_1: 260 candidate frames -> 7 selected; living room_2: 212 candidate frames -> 11 selected
sync: top-down labels 1-8 match the selected-frame thumbnails

stages.name: Detect
stages.line: Run open-vocabulary detection and keep a pool of plausible table-like masks.
stages.caption: This panel summarizes the table-like masks surfaced by detection calls; Finder keeps competing hypotheses instead of committing early.
logs: sam3.request: 3 prompts over routed and focused evidence frames
detect.output: #1 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000528.png score=0.932; #2 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000480.png score=0.919; #3 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000513.png score=0.945; #4 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000492.png score=0.940
detect.reason: preserve competing table hypotheses for later comparison

stages.name: Selection Plan
stages.line: Organize detected candidates into a candidate-centered shortlist and choose what evidence to compare next.
stages.caption: The selection planner ranks the initial coarse candidates and chooses where to spend focused evidence next.
logs: selection_plan.focus: compare around Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000528.png with 25 nearby frames
selection_plan.reason: top candidates are visually plausible but need candidate-local comparison

stages.name: Refine Evidence
stages.line: Gather candidate-local evidence around the shortlist before final selection.
stages.caption: This replay step is the focused evidence pass triggered by the selection plan, not a separate outer protocol.
logs: refine.evidence: request 25 nearby frames in 3 focused batches
refine.output: #1 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000513.png score=0.945; #2 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000492.png score=0.940; #3 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000522.png score=0.936; #4 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000519.png score=0.935

stages.name: Select
stages.line: Verify the shortlisted candidate with local visual evidence and candidate context.
stages.caption: The selector compares the refined shortlist and promotes the candidate with the strongest local evidence.
logs: select.compare: #1 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000513.png score=0.945; #2 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000492.png score=0.940; #3 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000522.png score=0.936; #4 Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000519.png score=0.935
select.promote: Dd4bFSTQ8gi_000513.png from prompt 'small dark brown table'
select.reason: local comparison makes the best candidate stable enough for judging

stages.name: Judge
stages.caption: The loop terminates once the candidate has sufficient visual evidence and a stable score.
logs: judge.reason: strongest verified mask for prompt 'small dark brown table'
